text.title: Zero-Click Search Adaptation Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing the path from preconditions to a valid spec artefact.

example.title: Happy-path spec artefact
example.description: Solo SEO operators whose GSC shows impressions stable but clicks down >20% over 90 days on top-50 queries — almost always AI Overview suppression. An operator with all prerequisites in place runs the methodology; outcome is a validated spec matching the output contract.
example.trace: Inputs satisfied → decision-tree run branch fires → rule r1-cite-over-traffic drives the artefact shape → self-check PASS → validator exit 0 → returned to caller.
